mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age between 0 and 19 then 1 else 0 end) A, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age between 20 and 29 then 1 else 0 end) B, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age between 30 and 39 then 1 else 0 end) C, SUM(CASE WHEN patient_age between 40 and 49 then 1 else 0 end) D from patient
select h.hospital_name,count(p.id) as count from hospital h LEFT JOIN patient p on h.id = p.hospital_id GROUP BY h.hospital_name
